name: @elizaos/python
description: elizaOS Core - Python runtime and types

scripts.build:
python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; import json; Path('elizaos.egg-info').mkdir(exist_ok=True); Path('elizaos.egg-info/PKG-INFO').write_text('Metadata-Version: 2.1
Name: elizaos
Version: 1.0.0
'); print('✅ Build completed - egg-info created')"
scripts.typecheck: python3.13 -c "import importlib.util, subprocess, sys; spec = importlib.util.find_spec('mypy'); sys.exit(0 if spec is None and print('mypy not installed, skipping typecheck') is None else subprocess.call([sys.executable, '-m', 'mypy', 'elizaos']))"

author: elizaOS
